GLDDF.Dialog.FatedRollHint: Roll the Destiny Fate Die with this PF2e check.
GLDDF.Settings.Preset.Name: Terminology Preset
GLDDF.Settings.Preset.Hint: Selects which set of labels, colors, and dice art to use for fate die results. Default uses Opportunity/Complication. Aegis Fallen uses Defiance/Tyranny. Tides of Destiny uses Tide/Storm.
GLDDF.Settings.EmissiveIntensity.Name: Dice Emission Intensity
GLDDF.Settings.EmissiveIntensity.Hint: Controls the glow strength of the Destiny Dice emission maps in Dice So Nice. 0 disables the glow; 1.0 uses the map's baked-in color as-is; higher values brighten the glow further. Requires a reload.
GLDDF.Settings.MotionTier.Name: Animation Style
GLDDF.Settings.MotionTier.Hint: Controls the Etched Glass result-card animations. Reduced uses simple fades; Default plays the full reveal sweep; Cinematic lengthens the ceremony with a trailing flare.
GLDDF.Settings.FaceConfig.Name: Dice Faces
GLDDF.Settings.FaceConfig.Label: Configure
GLDDF.Settings.FaceConfig.Hint: Configure each physical die face: result kind, numeric value, and PNG texture.
GLDDF.Settings.FaceConfig.Title: Destiny Dice Faces
GLDDF.Settings.FaceConfig.ReloadHint: Dice So Nice texture changes require a Foundry reload. Result and value changes apply to future fate rolls.
GLDDF.Notify.NoFace: GLUniverse Destiny Dice | {notation} produced no readable face. See console for details.
GLDDF.Notify.RollFailed: GLUniverse Destiny Dice | Failed to roll Fate Die. See console for details.
